creator: Ralf.vanderEnden@deltares.nl
text:
Hello,

Since my upgrade to 10-RELEASE I couldn't compile mkvtoolnix anymore as stated by Emanuel. A simple workaround is to disable CURL support.

The following line in command_line.cpp is causing the issue:

brng::push_back(keys, rel.urls | badap::map_keys | badap::filtered([](std::string const &key) { return key != "general"; }));

I'm not a CPP expert so have no idea how to rewrite it to make it compile on 10.0. A complete log can be found here: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pkg-fallout/Week-of-Mon-20140303/127325.html

Best regards,
Ralf van der Enden
